description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the php:7.4 Docker image with a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq, apt-get install wget git zip unzip -yqq, curls the Composer installer and executes it, installs xdebug-beta via pecl, enables the xdebug extension, and runs php composer.phar install. Define three test jobs named test:php7.2, test:php7.3, and test:php7.4, each in the default test stage and each overriding the image to php:7.2, php:7.3, and php:7.4 respectively, with allow_failure set to false. In each job execute vendor/bin/phpunit --configuration phpunit.xml --coverage-text --colors=never. No artifacts, caches, or additional rules are specified.
